description: This component is functionally identical to Boolean Reference Driver. Except it only accepts IAssets and acts as a user for assets in ``FalseTarget`` and ``TrueTarget`` meaning assets assigned to this component won't get cleaned up by the asset optimizer world processes.

fields.Target: The field to drive the value of.
fields.FalseTarget: The asset to drive ``Target`` to when ``State`` is false.
fields.TrueTarget: The asset to drive ``Target`` to when ``State`` is true.

usage: Attach this component to a slot, and (optionally) put an asset into the False and/or True target fields. Then, put a field which you want to change the asset of into ``Target``. now, switching ``State`` will allow switching between the values of ``FalseTarget`` and ``TrueTarget``.
